name: task-orchestrator
description: Autonomous task execution engine with atomic claiming, convergence tracking, and sharded state

scripts.pkg:lint: node -e "const s=require('./package.json').scripts;const r=['test','test:watch','test:coverage','typecheck','build','prepublishOnly'];const a=['t','tw','tc','c','b'];r.forEach(k=>{if(!s[k]){console.error('Missing canonical script: '+k);process.exit(1)}});a.forEach(k=>{if(!s[k]){console.error('Missing shortcut script: '+k);process.exit(1)}})"
scripts.all: npm run pkg:lint && npm run c && npm run t && npm run b
scripts.version: npm run b && git add dist/
